title: Watchlist & Price Alerts
description: Authenticated members watch listings via a heart icon toggle, view their watchlist page, and receive price drop email alerts when sellers reduce prices.

flows.title: Watch / Unwatch a Listing
flows.trigger: User clicks the heart icon on a listing card or detail page

steps.title: Click Heart Icon
steps.tooltip: WatchButton renders over listing images on ListingCard and on the detail page gallery. FaRegHeart (unwatched) / FaHeart (watched). Minimum 44x44px tap target.

steps.title: Check Auth State
steps.tooltip: useAuth() — if !isAuthenticated, push to {pathname}?login=true to open the login modal. No toast shown — the modal open is the signal.

steps.title: Optimistic UI Update
steps.tooltip: Cancels in-flight ['watchlist', 'status', listingId] queries, snapshots cache, and immediately flips is_watching in the cache before the API call resolves.

steps.title: Watch Listing
steps.tooltip: Body: { listing_id }. Calls addWatcherServer(userId, listingId). On 23505 unique violation, returns the existing row rather than erroring.

errorCases.result: Returns 409 — client treats as success, no rollback

steps.title: Unwatch Listing
steps.tooltip: Query param: ?listing_id=... Calls removeWatcherServer(userId, listingId). Returns 404 if watcher row not found — client treats as success.

errorCases.result: Returns 404 — client treats as success, no rollback

steps.title: Update Watcher Count
steps.tooltip: AFTER INSERT OR DELETE trigger on watchers table. update_watcher_count() increments or decrements listings.watcher_count. Decrement is clamped to 0 via GREATEST(0, ...).

steps.title: Show Result Toast
steps.tooltip: Watch success: 'Added to Watchlist — We\'ll tell you if the price drops.' Unwatch success: 'Removed from Watchlist — You will no longer receive alerts.' Error: 'Something went wrong — Please try again.'

steps.title: Invalidate Query Cache
steps.tooltip: On settle (success or error): invalidates ['watchlist', 'status', listingId] and the root ['watchlist'] key, refreshing the watchlist page if open.

flows.title: Load Watch Status on Render
flows.trigger: ListingCard or ListingDetail renders with a listingId

steps.title: Fetch Watch Status
steps.tooltip: getWatchStatusServer(userId, listingId) — maybeSingle() lookup returns { is_watching: boolean }. Query key: ['watchlist', 'status', listingId]. Disabled when listingId is falsy.

errorCases.result: Returns 401 — WatchButton renders in unauthenticated state
Returns 500 — button defaults to unwatched state

steps.title: Render Heart State
steps.tooltip: Defaults to is_watching: false while loading. aria-pressed reflects watch state. aria-busy true while mutation pending.

steps.title: Route Guard
steps.tooltip: proxy.ts guards /watchlist — unauthenticated users are redirected to /. See route-protection.json.

steps.title: Open Watchlist Page
steps.tooltip: Accessible via Watchlist link in the user dropdown nav (HiOutlineHeart icon).

steps.title: Fetch Watched Listings
steps.tooltip: getWatchedListingsServer(userId) — joins watchers → listings → listing_photos. Filters soft-deleted listings. Ordered by watched_at DESC. Query key: ['watchlist'].

errorCases.result: Returns 500 — page shows error state with retry prompt

steps.title: Render Listing Grid
steps.tooltip: Renders ListingCard for each WatchedListing. Sold listings show a 'Sold' overlay badge. Skeleton shown while loading (count: 8).

paths.label: Empty
paths.detail: Empty state: heart icon + 'Your watchlist is empty' + Browse listings CTA

flows.title: Price Drop Email Alert
flows.trigger: Seller reduces price_cents on a listing

steps.title: Detect Price Drop
steps.tooltip: AFTER UPDATE OF price_cents trigger on listings. detect_price_drop() fires when NEW.price_cents < OLD.price_cents — inserts a price_drop_notifications row with listing_id, old_price_cents, new_price_cents.

steps.title: Cron Job Fires
steps.tooltip: Vercel cron schedule: */15 * * * * (every 15 minutes). Calls GET /api/cron/price-drops with Authorization: Bearer {CRON_SECRET}.

steps.title: Fetch Notifications
steps.tooltip: Fetches up to 100 unprocessed rows (processed=false) from price_drop_notifications, ordered by created_at ASC (oldest first). Secured by CRON_SECRET bearer token.

errorCases.condition: Authorization header missing or incorrect CRON_SECRET

steps.title: Resolve Eligible Watchers
steps.tooltip: For each notification: queries watchers WHERE listing_id matches AND (last_notified_price_cents IS NULL OR last_notified_price_cents > new_price_cents). Skips watchers already notified at or below the new price.

steps.title: Look Up Watcher Email
steps.tooltip: auth.admin.getUserById(watcher.user_id) via admin client. If userError or no email, watcher is silently skipped.

steps.title: Send Price Drop Email
steps.tooltip: Subject: '{listingTitle} just dropped in price!' Body: title, old price (strikethrough), new price, CTA button to /listing/{listingId}, fallback plain-text URL. listingTitle is HTML-escaped. Uses emailLayout() branded shell.

steps.title: Record Notified Price
steps.tooltip: Updates watchers.last_notified_price_cents = new_price_cents for this watcher. Prevents duplicate notifications on successive smaller drops.

steps.title: Mark Notification Done
steps.tooltip: Sets price_drop_notifications.processed = true after all watcher emails for that notification have been attempted. Returns { processed: N, emails_sent: N }.

steps.title: Remove Watch on Sold
steps.notes: When a listing transitions to status=sold, watchers rows should be deleted automatically (or watcher_count zeroed). Currently sold listings remain on the watchlist page with a Sold overlay but the user must manually unwatch. A DB trigger on listing status change to sold could clean up watchers rows, or the PATCH /api/listings/[id]/status handler could call removeWatchersForListing.

steps.title: Unwatch in Email
steps.notes: Price drop email has no unsubscribe or unwatch link. Adding a one-click unwatch token URL (e.g., /api/watchlist/unwatch?token=...) would reduce friction and follow email best practices. Token would encode listing_id + user_id and be validated server-side without requiring login.

flows.title: Seller Sees Watcher Demand
flows.trigger: Seller opens QuickEditPrice modal on a listing

steps.title: Open Quick Edit Price
steps.tooltip: Seller clicks Quick Edit Price from the dashboard listing row actions menu.

steps.title: Show Watcher Count
steps.tooltip: listings.watcher_count is denormalized and available on the listing object — no extra API call needed. Displayed as demand signal (e.g., 'X people are watching this listing').

steps.title: Watcher Count on Row
steps.notes: watcher_count is only shown inside QuickEditPrice. Surfacing it inline on the ListingRow (e.g., a small heart + count badge) would give sellers a at-a-glance demand signal without opening the modal.
